name: aecctx-inspector
description: Read-only inspection and quality-gate orchestration for validated AECCTX packages.

interface.longDescription: Validate, inspect, compare and explain AECCTX package evidence through read-only parity with the AECCTX library and CLI.
defaultPrompt: Validate and inspect this AECCTX package.
Compare these two AECCTX package revisions.
